tips_en: Start with Paper 1 (DVAO), since its variance-adaptive GRPO method establishes a foundational algorithmic improvement that directly informs the reinforcement learning stage in Paper 3 (Macaron-A2UI). Papers 2 and 3 then offer complementary agent advances: SkillOpt optimizes reusable text skills, while Macaron-A2UI synthesizes executable user interfaces.
tips_zh: 建议先读论文1（DVAO），因为它对GRPO的动态方差自适应改进为论文3的强化学习阶段提供了基础算法视角。论文2和3则从互补角度推进智能体能力：SkillOpt优化可复用的文本技能，而Macaron-A2UI生成可执行的交互界面。
